notes: Phase 3 (Trial of the Crusader 25 Heroic / Argent Crusade Tribute Chest — Alliance itemization; Horde runs faction-mirrored items of equal value) Best in Slot from the Icy Veins WotLK Classic Demonology Warlock Dps gear guide. Alliance itemization used throughout (Icy Veins splits Phase 3 by faction on some class pages) — Horde equivalents come from the same Argent Crusade Tribute Chest / bosses at identical item level, just different names/appearance. Rings/Trinkets: the source lists 2-3 ranked options in one row (you equip two) — split here into two named slots, top pick in slot 1; combined source text kept for both. Enchants/gems reused from the matching wotlk/p4 spec profile (same stat priorities apply across phases).

gems.name: Chaotic Skyflare Diamond (+40 spellpower, +3% crit damage — requires two blue/purple/green gems)
Runed Cardinal Ruby (+23 spellpower) — or Runed Scarlet Ruby (rare)
Reckless Ametrine (+16 spellpower / +10 haste) — or Veiled Ametrine (+16 spellpower / +10 hit), Rigid King's Amber for socket bonus
Purified Dreadstone (+10 spellpower / +10 spirit) — or Purified Twilight Opal (rare)
